title: Audit Comp | Yeet Bug Bounty

audit.reason: The audit report provides detailed findings and solutions for vulnerabilities in the Yeet Protocol. The solutions are well-explained and include complete, production-ready implementations. The report also includes testing for the identified vulnerabilities, ensuring the fixes are robust.
audit.improvements: Consider adding more detailed testing for each solution, including edge cases and potential attack vectors. Additionally, providing a comprehensive list of all contracts audited and their respective findings could enhance the report's usefulness.
